description_long: This is a modern military jet airplane with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a blue-gray camouflage paint scheme. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, featuring small wingtip extensions. Twin vertical stabilizers rise from the rear, flanking two large jet engine exhausts. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, enclosed by a dark, streamlined canopy. The undercarriage is not visible, suggesting retractable landing gear, and the overall design emphasizes speed and maneuverability.
description: A blue-gray camouflaged military jet with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward-enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and wide, swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, low-mounted swept wings, and twin vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin engine exhausts, dual vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with emphasis on the tail and wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and small wingtip extensions; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated at the rear fuselage with visible exhausts.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers mounted low on the tail.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-piece canopy, likely multi-seat based on fuselage length.
